scripts.build: vite build && BUILD_TARGET=content vite build && BUILD_TARGET=background vite build && rm -rf dist/banner dist/.DS_Store
scripts.zip: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../composition-grid-v$npm_package_version.zip . && cd .. && echo 'Created composition-grid-v'$npm_package_version'.zip'
scripts.zip:firefox: npm run build:firefox && cd dist-firefox && zip -r ../composition-grid-firefox-v$npm_package_version.zip . && cd .. && echo 'Created Firefox zip'
